theme: Light Theme with Heavy Contrast Sections
archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) adapted for Earthy Warmth

brand_identity.name: TrustBridge Counsel
brand_identity.tone: Calm, deeply trustworthy, psychologically safe, elegant, mature, premium, editorial, structured, emotionally neutral.

headings.description: Used for all primary headings, quotes, and the brand logo text. Delivers an editorial, luxurious, and intelligent feel.

body.description: Clean, minimal sans-serif for high legibility and a grounded, modern contrast to the serif.

scales.quote: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl italic leading-relaxed text-center

navbar.style: Floating transparent navbar on initial load. On scroll: soft glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F2EE]/80) with subtle border-b border-[#3B2A24]/10.
navbar.brand: 'TrustBridge Counsel' (Cormorant Garamond, text-2xl, #3B2A24). Tagline: 'We listen, We act, We Deliver' (text-xs, italic, text-[#5A4034]).
navbar.links: Right nav: Home, About Us, Services, Blogs, Book Consultation. Links should use Manrope, text-sm, hover:text-[#B08D57] transition-colors.
navbar.cta: Pill shape (rounded-full), bg-[#B08D57] text-[#FAF8F6]. Elegant hover glow: hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(176,141,87,0.4)] hover:bg-[#3B2A24].

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-[#B08D57] text-[#FAF8F6] font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#3B2A24] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(59,42,36,0.2)] hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border-2 border-[#3B2A24] text-[#3B2A24] font-medium hover:bg-[#3B2A24] hover:text-[#FAF8F6]

trust_badges.style: Small pill-shaped tags or flex items with a dot/icon. bg-[#F7F2EE] border border-[#D8C3B0] text-[#5A4034] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider rounded-full px-4 py-2

hero.layout: Almost full viewport (min-h-[90vh]). Split layout: left content (60%), right abstract visual (40%).
hero.left_content: Headline: 'Where Communication Breaks Down, I Build Alignment.' in Cormorant Garamond. Supporting text in Manrope. CTA + Trust Badges grid below.
hero.right_visual: Abstract right-side visual. Use Framer Motion for subtle floating SVG/CSS blobs in Sand Beige and Soft Mocha, heavily blurred (blur-3xl). Overlay the provided `hero_abstract_visual` image with a soft gradient mask to blend it seamlessly into the Warm Ivory background. NO stock photos or people.

why_trustbridge.title: Why TrustBridge Counsel?
why_trustbridge.layout: 3 feature blocks in a grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3).
why_trustbridge.cards: Pattern Awareness, Conflict De-escalation, Conscious Decision-Making. Premium matte cards (see surfaces: cards), rounded-3xl (24px), internal padding p-10.

center_quote.layout: Massive vertical padding (py-32). bg-[#3B2A24] text-[#FAF8F6] or use `quote_background` image with heavy dark overlay.
center_quote.content: 'When it comes to conflict and communication, how it is handled matters as much as what is said.' in Cormorant Garamond, center aligned, max-w-4xl mx-auto.

trust_value_grid.layout: 6 cards in a bento-style or balanced grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) gap-6.
trust_value_grid.content: Confidential & Secure, Neutral & Unbiased, Structured & Solution-Focused, Respectful & Professional, Clarity Over Assumptions, Real Situations, Real Resolution.

contact_form.layout: Bottom of Home page (scroll target for 'Book Consultation'). Soft matte gradient background. Minimalist Shadcn form customized to remove generic borders, using border-b only for inputs (editorial style).
contact_form.style: Inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#3B2A24]/20 rounded-none focus:border-[#B08D57] focus:ring-0. Elegant and unintrusive.

footer.content: Brand + tagline, quick links, CTA, contact placeholder, 'Confidential. Respectful. Solution Focused.'

image_urls.name: hero_abstract_visual
image_urls.description: Abstract luxury editorial composition for the right side of the hero section. Soft architectural lines representing communication. Use with a gradient fade.

image_urls.name: quote_background
image_urls.description: Abstract soft matte gradient for the center quote section or contact section background to add texture.

image_urls.name: feature_abstract
image_urls.description: Minimalist abstract sculpture in deep espresso and walnut wood, to be used selectively inside feature cards or as decorative imagery in the 'Why TrustBridge' section.

testing_guidelines.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
